message:
🌱 Add antrea: Antrea Proxy NodePort Service Support mission (#925)

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,79 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "antrea-1463-antrea-proxy-nodeport-service-support",
+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "antrea: Antrea Proxy NodePort Service Support",
+    "description": "Antrea Proxy NodePort Service Support. Community-requested feature.",
+    "type": "feature",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Check current antrea deployment",
+        "description": "Verify your antrea version and configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n antrea -l app.kubernetes.io/name=antrea\nhelm list -n antrea 2>/dev/null || echo \"Not installed via Helm\"\n```\nThis feature requires a working antrea installation."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review antrea configuration",
+        "description": "Inspect the relevant antrea configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get all -n antrea -l app.kubernetes.io/name=antrea\nkubectl get configmap -n antrea -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=antrea\n```\n[Google Docs](https://docs.google.com/document/d/196XsLQHEJM1BVRovpaSrnZxxg3beZ8x8fsJ9CFmqzws/edit?usp=sharing)\n**Describe what you are trying to solve**\n_This draft is only for Linux Nodes, we still need to design the solution for Windows"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for Antrea Proxy NodePort Service Support",
+        "description": "Note: To verify this PR, the NodePort support is enabled. The feature gate should be disabled before merging this PR.\n```yaml\n### Appendix\n\n#### TC handle ID generation(NodePort Traffic From Remote / Request Traffic)\n\nThe handle ID `0x6dea9` and `0x106dea9` is calculated from:\n\n- IP address index. As an interface may have multiple IP addresses. When getting IP addresses from an interface in a slice, the IP address index is the slice index.\n- L3 protocol.  IPv4(0x0), IPv6(0x29)\n- L4 protocol.  TCP(0x6), UDP(0x11), SCTP(0x84)\n- port number. NodePort port number.\n\nThe handle ID is :\n```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Verify the feature works",
+        "description": "Test that the new capability is working as expected:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n antrea -l app.kubernetes.io/name=antrea\nkubectl get events -n antrea --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10\n```\nConfirm the feature described in \"Antrea Proxy NodePort Service Support\" is functioning correctly."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "Note: To verify this PR, the NodePort support is enabled. The feature gate should be disabled before merging this PR.",
+      "codeSnippets": [
+        "### Appendix\n\n#### TC handle ID generation(NodePort Traffic From Remote / Request Traffic)\n\nThe handle ID `0x6dea9` and `0x106dea9` is calculated from:\n\n- IP address index. As an interface may have multiple IP addresses. When getting IP addresses from an interface in a slice, the IP address index is the slice index.\n- L3 protocol.  IPv4(0x0), IPv6(0x29)\n- L4 protocol.  TCP(0x6), UDP(0x11), SCTP(0x84)\n- port number. NodePort port number.\n\nThe handle ID is :"
+      ]
+    }
+  },
